case_title: ANH LA ET AL VS. UBER TECHNOLOGIES, INC.

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-02-2017 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO JUL-19-2017 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF INTENDS TO AMEND HER COMPLAINT.
